upcomingDecision.label: IMF Executive Board meeting outcome
upcomingDecision.note: The Board date has passed. Confirm the official IMF Board outcome before marking the 3rd EFF review or 2nd RSF review as approved.

reviews.name: 3rd Review
reviews.note: Staff-level agreement announced Mar 27, 2026; May 8 Board date has passed and official outcome needs verification.

relatedFacilities.note: Separate climate-resilience facility; not included in the $7B EFF progress bar.

keyObjectives: Achieve primary fiscal surplus of 1% of GDP
Broaden tax base — raise tax-to-GDP ratio above 13%
Reform energy sector SOEs to reduce circular debt
Reduce inflation to SBP's 5–7% medium-term target
Phase out fiscal incentives for SEZs/STZs by 2035
Establish Pakistan Regulatory Registry by Jun 2027
methodologyNote: Manually curated from IMF Board decisions, press releases, and Pakistani financial media. Review schedule is approximate and subject to IMF/Pakistan agreement. SDR amounts from IMF Country Report. The May 8, 2026 Board date has passed; keep the 3rd EFF review and 2nd RSF review in verification status until an official IMF outcome is confirmed.
